scripts.build: npx @tailwindcss/cli -i ./resources/css/actionable-column.css -o ./resources/dist/css/actionable-column.css --minify && node -e "const fs=require('fs');let c=fs.readFileSync('./resources/dist/css/actionable-column.css','utf8');c=c.replace(/@layer\s+properties\s*\{[^}]*(?:\{[^}]*\}[^}]*)*\}/g,'').replace(/@layer\s+[\w,\s]+;/g,'').replace(/@layer\s+theme\s*\{[^}]*\}/g,'').trim();fs.writeFileSync('./resources/dist/css/actionable-column.css',c);" && php ../../../artisan filament:assets && cd -
